# Mastella Advisory

> Off-market M&A advisory for founder-led businesses worth £5–50M across the UK and internationally. Based in London, UK.

## About

Mastella Advisory provides end-to-end M&A advisory services for founder-led businesses. The firm combines decades of traditional M&A expertise with modern technology to make world-class advisory services accessible to founder-led businesses across the UK and internationally.

## Core Services

- Exit Planning: Strategic guidance to prepare businesses for sale and maximise exit value
- Deal Execution: End-to-end transaction management from buyer identification to deal closure
- Fundraising: Capital raises from seed to Series A, growth capital, and pre-exit funding
- Business Valuation: Data-driven valuations to establish true business worth
- Executive Search & Interim Solutions: Strategic leadership placement pre and post exit

- Contact: https://mastellagroup.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://mastellagroup.com/privacy-policy

## Target Audience

Founder-led businesses worth £5–50M across the UK and internationally. Family-owned companies, founder-managed firms, and PE-backed businesses seeking an exit or capital raise. Most of our work is UK lower mid-market, with cross-border transactions where a founder's buyer universe is international (including Spanish and Portuguese deals).

## Location

International House, 101 King's Cross Road, London, WC1X 9LP, United Kingdom
